item.title: Sensex Slumps Over 2% Amid Broad-Based Sector Declines; Tech Mahindra Leads Gains
item.description: The Indian equity markets witnessed a sharp sell-off on 23 March 2026, with the Sensex tumbling 2.30% to close at 72,816.26, marking a steep decline of 1,716.70 points. The downturn was broad-based, with all 38 sectors on the BSE ending in the red, led by a significant slump in the metal sector. Market breadth was severely negative, reflecting widespread investor caution amid weak global cues and subdued domestic sentiment. Time: 33 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a notable downturn, declining 2.57% on the day and registering a steeper 4.33% fall over the past five trading sessions. This broad-based weakness has been driven by a pronounced imbalance in stock performance, with defensive sectors underperforming and cyclical stocks struggling to provide support. Time: 33 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has experienced a notable downturn, declining by 3.8% on the day and nearly 3.94% over the past five trading sessions. This broad-based weakness is underscored by a severely negative advance-decline ratio, signalling widespread selling pressure across the segment. Time: 33 minutes ago

item.title: Midcap Segment Faces Sharp Decline as BSE MIDCAP 150 Drops 3.58%
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, experienced a significant downturn on 23 Mar 2026, declining by 3.58% in a single session and extending losses to 4.2% over the past five trading days. This broad-based weakness was underscored by a severely negative advance-decline ratio, signalling widespread selling pressure across the mid-cap universe. Time: 33 minutes ago

item.title: NOCIL Ltd Surges on Heavy Value Trading Despite Strong Sell Rating
item.description: NOCIL Ltd, a small-cap player in the specialty chemicals sector, witnessed a remarkable surge in trading value and volume on 23 Mar 2026, outperforming its sector and broader market indices despite a prevailing negative sentiment in the chemicals industry. The stock’s sharp intraday gains and elevated turnover highlight significant institutional interest and active large order flow, signalling a potential shift in investor perception amid cautious market conditions. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Hindalco Industries Sees High-Value Trading Amid Four-Day Decline
item.description: Hindalco Industries Ltd, a heavyweight in the Non-Ferrous Metals sector, witnessed significant trading activity on 23 March 2026, with a total traded value exceeding ₹322.9 crores. Despite this robust liquidity and investor interest, the stock has endured a four-day consecutive decline, shedding over 9% in value during this period, reflecting a cautious market sentiment amid sectoral headwinds. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Reliance Power Ltd Sees Heavy Volume Amid Sharp Price Decline
item.description: Reliance Power Ltd (RPOWER) emerged as one of the most actively traded stocks on 23 Mar 2026, registering a substantial volume surge of over 1.79 crore shares. Despite this heightened activity, the stock underperformed the broader power sector and the Sensex, closing near its 52-week low and signalling continued bearish sentiment among investors. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Tata Consultancy Services Ltd. Sees High-Value Trading Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: Tata Consultancy Services Ltd. (TCS), a stalwart in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, witnessed significant trading activity on 23 March 2026, with a total traded value exceeding ₹328 crore. Despite hitting a new 52-week low intraday, the stock outperformed its sector and demonstrated rising investor participation, signalling nuanced market sentiment amid mixed technical indicators. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: NOCIL Ltd Surges on Exceptional Volume Amid Sector Weakness
item.description: NOCIL Ltd, a small-cap player in the specialty chemicals sector, witnessed a remarkable surge in trading volume on 23 March 2026, with over 2.91 crore shares changing hands. Despite a strong intraday price rally, the stock remains under pressure from a recent downgrade, reflecting a complex interplay of market enthusiasm and cautious investor sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Shriram Finance Ltd Sees Heavy Trading Amidst Declining Momentum
item.description: Shriram Finance Ltd, a prominent large-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, witnessed significant value-based trading on 23 Mar 2026, despite a notable decline in its share price. The stock’s performance, institutional interest, and trading volumes highlight a complex market dynamic amid a broader sectoral downturn. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Sensex Slides Over 1800 Points as Realty Sector Drags Market Lower
item.description: The Indian equity market witnessed a sharp sell-off on 23 March 2026, with the Sensex tumbling 1,826.32 points, or 2.45%, to close at 72,706.64. The Nifty followed suit, dragged down by widespread sectoral weakness and a dismal advance-decline ratio, signalling broad-based selling pressure. Realty emerged as the worst-performing sector, while IT managed to eke out marginal gains amid the turmoil. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has experienced a notable downturn, declining by 3.8% on the day and nearly 3.94% over the past five trading sessions. This broad-based weakness has been accompanied by a severely negative advance-decline ratio, signalling widespread selling pressure across the segment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, experienced a significant downturn on 23 Mar 2026, declining by 3.63% in a single session and registering a 4.25% drop over the past five trading days. This broad-based weakness was underscored by a severely negative advance-decline ratio, with only one stock advancing against 149 decliners, signalling widespread selling pressure across the mid-cap universe. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a notable downturn, declining 2.71% on the day and 4.47% over the past five trading sessions. This broad-based weakness was marked by a stark advance-decline ratio of 0.06x, with only 6 stocks advancing against 94 decliners, underscoring the pervasive selling pressure across heavyweight constituents. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Indiqube Spaces Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 23 Mar 2026
item.description: Indiqube Spaces Ltd witnessed a sharp intraday decline on 23 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 137.75, down 7.61% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid heightened volatility and persistent downward pressure. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Ather Energy Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 23 Mar 2026
item.description: Ather Energy Ltd witnessed a notable intraday decline on 23 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 717.7, down 8.37% from its previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting immediate price pressures amid a broadly bearish market environment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: OneSource Specialty Pharma Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: OneSource Specialty Pharma Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 23 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 1,354.75 as the stock faced sustained selling pressure amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: NTPC Green Energy Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 23 Mar 2026
item.description: NTPC Green Energy Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 95.88, reflecting a 5.27% drop as the stock underperformed its sector and broader market amid prevailing bearish sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Brainbees Solutions Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 23 Mar 2026
item.description: Brainbees Solutions Ltd witnessed a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 230.5, reflecting a sharp price pressure of -7.95% as the stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid a challenging trading session. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: DEE Development Engineers Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: DEE Development Engineers Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 23 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 240.65, down 9.99% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and the broader market amid heightened volatility and bearish market sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago
